inputs.label: Initial Investment
inputs.businessContext: Total upfront capital expenditure for the project

businessContext_i18n.en: Total upfront capital expenditure for the project
businessContext_i18n.tr: Proje için toplam peşin sermaye harcaması
businessContext_i18n.de: Gesamte anfängliche Investitionsausgabe für das Projekt

inputs.label: Discount Rate
inputs.businessContext: Annual discount rate reflecting cost of capital or required return

businessContext_i18n.en: Annual discount rate reflecting cost of capital or required return
businessContext_i18n.tr: Sermaye maliyetini veya gerekli getiriyi yansıtan yıllık iskonto oranı
businessContext_i18n.de: Jährlicher Diskontsatz, der die Kapitalkosten oder die geforderte Rendite widerspiegelt

inputs.label: Annual Cash Flow
inputs.businessContext: Expected constant annual net cash inflow from the project

businessContext_i18n.en: Expected constant annual net cash inflow from the project
businessContext_i18n.tr: Projeden beklenen sabit yıllık net nakit girişi
businessContext_i18n.de: Erwarteter konstanter jährlicher Netto-Cashzufluss aus dem Projekt

inputs.label: Maximum Evaluation Period
inputs.businessContext: Maximum number of years to consider for payback; beyond this, payback is not achieved

businessContext_i18n.en: Maximum number of years to consider for payback; beyond this, payback is not achieved
businessContext_i18n.tr: Geri ödeme için dikkate alınacak maksimum yıl sayısı; bunun ötesinde geri ödeme sağlanamaz
businessContext_i18n.de: Maximale Anzahl von Jahren für die Amortisation; darüber hinaus wird die Amortisation nicht erreicht

suggestedActions: Review inputs and verify results against site standards.
